column1: # huge_app.csv gave us a single 3 MB app partition with no room for an
# OTA write target — every OTA attempt errored with NO_PARTITION (err=10).
# This layout reserves two 3 MB app slots so Update.begin() can write
# the inactive one and then flip the boot pointer.
# Flash budget on the T-Display-S3 (16 MB): bootloader/partition table
# (~64 KB) + nvs (20 KB) + otadata (8 KB) + app0 (3 MB) + app1 (3 MB) +
# remainder as SPIFFS for future use. NVS offset matches huge_app so
# existing match history / defaults survive the flash-layout change.
